name: global-project-standards
description: Padrões globais para QUALQUER projeto - Git, Hooks, TypeScript, React, Backlog
instructions: Siga todas as regras definidas em {{USER_HOME}}/.opencode\rules.md e use os templates em .opencode/hooks.md

rules.description: Git: Branch coolify, ZERO auto-commit, build success required
Data: BR timezone, DD/MM/YYYY format, descending order in history
Hooks: Check hooks.md first, never read full docs without need
TypeScript: No any, explicit interfaces, optional chaining
Naming: PascalCase components, use hooks, SCREAMING_SNAKE constants
Error Handling: Try/Catch required, toast feedback, console with context
React: Function components, hooks pattern, loading states required
State: Local → Context → Zustand/Redux (only if needed)
Supabase: RLS required, no select(*), service role never exposed
Backlog: Top = FIXES & FEATURES, History = descending order, dates in BR format
Docs: Update hooks.md after creating hooks, keep backlog organized
